disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden spinning dizziness triggered by standing up this evening
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I stood up from the sofa and the whole room span around me — it came on all of a sudden.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Numbness and tingling in the fingers of BOTH hands, symmetrical
trigger_question_examples: Is it one hand or both?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's both hands — all my fingers have gone numb and tingly at the same time.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Subjective whole-body weakness — feels unable to lift the arms
trigger_question_examples: Can you move your arms and legs normally?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel so weak I can barely lift my arms — I've got no energy at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Rapid breathing and feeling panicky/frightened during the episode
trigger_question_examples: How are you feeling in yourself right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm panicking and breathing really fast — I feel like something awful is happening to me.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No slurred speech, no facial droop/asymmetry, and no true loss of consciousness or fall
trigger_question_examples: Has your speech been slurred, or has one side of your face drooped?
Did you actually faint or fall?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my speech is fine and my face feels normal. I didn't black out or fall — I just felt like I might.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recently told of borderline-low B12 and enlarged red cells; frightened after reading about permanent spinal-cord damage
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any recent tests or diagnoses?
Is there something in particular you're worried this could be?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: A couple of weeks ago they said my B12 was low and my red cells were large. I read that this can permanently damage your spinal cord and I'm terrified that's what's happening now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Currently refusing to mobilise because of fear of falling; high falls risk this evening
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to move around safely right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I won't get up — I'm scared I'll fall. My husband is here but I don't want to move.
